feat(reconciliation): add cfdi:backfill-payments command for REP payment data

REPs imported before cfdi_payments table existed have no payment records.

and --dry-run for inspection.

FindScaledShapeModel: SearchPyramid 返回后插入 NonMaxSuppressionOverlap 调用,
消除缩放匹配的重复候选 (applyNMS=false 由 FinalizeResults 跳过, 改为独立调用)

远距离候选对直接跳过昂贵的 OBB 交集计算; OBB corners 改为 lazy compute

commit.message:
feat: add mah.start_job() for async work from plugin pages

Add mah.start_job(label, fn) API that creates a background job and runs
the callback asynchronously with full job progress support. This lets
plugin pages return immediately while heavy work (API calls, downloads)
runs in the background with SSE progress updates via the jobs panel.

Refactored fal.ai generate page to use start_job instead of blocking
the HTTP response for the entire API call. Also reduced page timeout
from 5min to 30s since pages no longer need to wait for long operations.

commit.message:
T13: LoRA + adapter training pipeline

Implements src/training/lora_trainer.py:
- LoRATrainer class with train(model, reservoir, interface, dataset, config)
- freeze_base_model: freezes all non-LoRA params; only lora_* + interface trained
- AdamW optimizer with separate param groups: lora_lr vs interface_lr
- Cosine LR schedule with linear warmup
- Gradient checkpointing support (gradient_checkpointing_enable)
- Mixed precision BF16 via torch.autocast (CUDA only; CPU falls back gracefully)
- Wandb logging: loss, lr, grad norms, reservoir state stats
- Checkpoint save/load: LoRA adapter weights + interface state dict (not frozen base)
- Early stopping on validation loss with configurable patience
- MixedDataLoader: combines multiple datasets with normalised sampling ratios

Also adds:
- configs/lora_training.yaml: full config template with per-field comments
- tests/test_trainer.py: 27 tests covering smoke run, loss decrease,
  checkpoint round-trip, param grad isolation, PEFT integration,
  MixedDataLoader, and early stopping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add catch-all /api/v1/* proxy Route Handler for runtime API forwarding

next.config.ts rewrites are evaluated at build time; if API_BASE_URL is not

commit.message:
T11: Infini-attention compressive memory baseline

Implements Control 3 (strongest non-reservoir memory baseline) from the
implementation plan: Infini-attention added to Qwen3.5-0.8B-Base.

Key components:
- src/models/infini_attention.py: Core implementation
  - CompressiveMemory: per-head associative matrix memory (M, z)
    with ELU+1 feature map, retrieve/update ops
  - InfiniAttentionLayer: wraps any attention module; adds memory
    retrieval side-path with Q/K/V adapter projections and learned
    beta mixing gate; zero-init so training starts from base model
  - apply_infini_attention(): patches model layers in-place
  - reset_infini_memory(), get_infini_trainable_params() helpers
  - InfiniAttentionConfig dataclass
- scripts/train_infini_attention.py: 5K-step training script
  (LoRA + infini-attention adapters, FineWeb data, wandb logging)
- scripts/eval_infini_attention.py: evaluation script writing
  results/baselines/infini_attention.json
- results/baselines/infini_attention.json: placeholder (populate
  after GPU training)
- tests/test_infini_attention.py: 32 unit tests (all passing)

Paper: Munkhdalai et al., 2024, arXiv:2404.07143

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add context window tracking implementation plan

Research and plan for surfacing real-time context % remaining
for Claude Code and Codex sessions on the dashboard. Covers
data sources, ingestion strategies, schema changes, and
tradeoff analysis across 9 tasks in 4 phases.

commit.message:
Add holdout model-space analysis script and disable atlas avoidance

New script scripts/analysis/holdout_model_space_analysis.py performs 6
analyses on holdout search data: formula error forensics, head self-
consistency, training neighborhood density, decoder attractor detection,
gradient landscape sensitivity, and synthesized training recommendations.
Outputs JSON report, per-sample weight file, and markdown summary.
Supports both local and Colab/Drive environments with auto-detection.

Disable ATLAS_AVOIDANCE_THRESHOLD (0.05 → 0.0) in the holdout search
notebook. Analysis showed the L2=0.528 avoidance radius hard-blocks all
fine-scale perturbations (scales 0.001-0.02), preventing iterative
refinement from revisiting the central region around best-Z where exact
matches likely live. 13/45 targets affected.

commit.message:
fix: prevent nmem flush from blocking forever on stdin (#27)

When spawned as a subprocess without piped input, sys.stdin.read()
blocks indefinitely because no EOF is ever sent. Add a 5s timeout
using ThreadPoolExecutor so the process exits gracefully instead
of hanging and accumulating as sleeping processes.

Closes #27

commit.message:
T7: Qwen3.5-0.8B-Base vanilla baselines evaluation script

Adds scripts/eval_qwen_vanilla.py — the primary reference baseline for all
subsequent comparisons. Records:
- Perplexity on held-out text (teacher-forced cross-entropy)
- Accuracy/exact-match/F1 on full T5 benchmark suite (memory, computation,
  emergent tasks, 23 benchmark configurations)
- Chaotic prediction quality vs Lyapunov time for Lorenz-63 and Mackey-Glass
  (T6 chaos data): RMSE, Lyapunov time, skill score
- Throughput (tokens/sec) with warmup
- VRAM usage (allocated, reserved, peak)
- Inference latency (p50, p95 in seconds)

Output: results/baselines/qwen35_vanilla.json (standardized EvalResult format)

commit.message:
Fix 16 state machine, session state & UI safety bugs across 8 files

- cache_resource TTL: add ttl=300 to MongoDB and Anthropic client caches
  to prevent permanent None caching on startup failure (H1, L5)
- Stuck states: add cancel button to contradiction resolution (M1),
  add _consistency_failed flag to prevent LLM re-runs on every rerun (M2),
  add _ops_commit_failed flag with explicit retry button (M3)
- Data safety: use getvalue() instead of read() for whiteboard upload (M4)
- Stale state: clear evolution_result, export data on reset and brain
  switch (M5, L3, L4, L6); preserve active_view on reset (L1);
  use reset_ingestion() for lock-blocked paths (L2); skip redundant
  book framework decode (L7)
- Code hygiene: add missing defaults to init_session_state (C1),
  remove dead ingestion_status key (C2), remove redundant clears (C3)
- Tests: update cache_resource mock in 19 test files to support ttl kwarg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v1.22.58: Fix missed PAGE_READONLY restore in ForceLoadAllForms

The integrity check in ForceLoadAllForms was still setting the sentinel
page back to PAGE_READONLY after repairing fields. This negated the
PAGE_READWRITE change, causing the write-skip flood to continue.

Removed all VirtualProtect calls on g_zeroPage — page stays
PAGE_READWRITE from initial allocation through gameplay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: polyline zigzag, Maps API key, UTC timezone, GPS_Tracking cleanup, road snapping

- gps.js: gate Firebase route push behind isMoving + >30m from last route
  point — stationary GPS jitter no longer pollutes polyline
- firebase.js: add appendRoute param to writeGpsPoint (live pos always
  updates; route only appends when actually moving)
- GAS_Pilot_Code.js: fix GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to web-restricted key
  (fixes ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED on GAS-served map)
- GAS_Pilot_Code.js: fix parseDatetimeLocal_ to detect Z suffix and
  parse UTC ISO via new Date() — fixes facility-left time 4hrs behind
- GAS_Pilot_Code.js: remove GPS_Tracking sheet functions (saveGpsPoint,
  saveGpsPointsBatch, getOrCreateGpsTrackingSheet_, getActiveDriversLive,
  getDriverRoute) — Firebase RTDB is source of truth for GPS
- GAS_Pilot_Code.js: remove liveKmMap lookup from getLiveOperations;
  add driverId to ops response
- api.js: remove dead saveGpsPoint/saveGpsPointsBatch/fetchDriverRoute exports
- docs/index.html: outlier filter 300m→5000m (highway-safe)
- docs/index.html: add rdpSimplify (RDP ε=8m) for render-time noise reduction
- docs/index.html: add snapToRoads() via Roads API interpolate=true
- docs/index.html: real-time polyline via child_added listener — polyline
  extends live as driver moves; initial route snapped to road centre-line
- AdminDashboardScreen.js: outlier filter 300m→5000m + RDP simplification

LiSendRawControlStreamPacket(). Note: miccapture.cpp still references
this function and will require a follow-up fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Prisma client stale cache on Vercel deployments

Run prisma generate before next build so Vercel always generates a fresh
client from the current schema. Without this, the cached client was missing
the AvailabilityRule/AvailabilityBlock/TutoringBooking models, causing
ctx.db.availabilityRule to be undefined at runtime.
